assertions.title: Configuration loads from environment and YAML

steps.expected: All config unit tests pass, covering YAML-only, env-override, env-only, defaults, and partial override scenarios
steps.observed: All 8 tests passed (TestConfigPrecedence/5 subtests, TestConfigMissingYAML, TestConfigInvalidYAML, TestConfigAllEnvVars). Exit code 0.

steps.expected: Startup logs show port 3199 (from env) instead of YAML default 3100, and DB connection fails due to overridden invalid DSN
steps.observed: Logs show {"port":"3199"} confirming env override of PORT. DB open fails with 'invalid DSN: missing the slash separating the database name' confirming MYSQL_DSN override. Exit code 1 as expected.

steps.expected: Exit code 0, Go code generated in internal/db/ matching migration schema
steps.observed: Exit code 0, no errors. Clean generation.

steps.expected: Exit code 0, all packages including generated sqlc code compile without errors
steps.observed: Exit code 0, no errors. Full project compiles cleanly.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-FOUND-004 confirmed via 8 unit tests (YAML loading, env var precedence, defaults, all env var mappings) and a live startup test showing PORT and MYSQL_DSN env overrides. VAL-FOUND-007 confirmed via successful sqlc generate (exit 0) and go build ./... (exit 0).
